name: kornix-max-bot
description: MAX Messenger bot for KORNIX/POLIV360 field status, irrigation and precipitation workflows.

scripts.build: pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:miniapp
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:server && pnpm run typecheck:miniapp
scripts.test: pnpm run test:server && pnpm run test:miniapp
scripts.test:server: pnpm run typecheck:server && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/tests/**/*.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm run typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && c8 --reporter=text node --test dist-test/tests/**/*.test.js && pnpm run test:miniapp
